line_57_CONTEXT_POLICY.before: Each thread is a fresh `mcp__codex__codex` call. **Never** use `mcp__codex__codex-reply`.
line_57_CONTEXT_POLICY.after: Each thread spawns a **fresh paseo codex reviewer sub-agent** (`create_agent`). **Never** continue a prior reviewer agent (`send_agent_prompt` / the `codex-reply` analog).

line_166_adversary_probe.before: Each probe is a fresh `mcp__codex__codex` call
line_166_adversary_probe.after: Each probe spawns a fresh paseo codex reviewer sub-agent

line_415_key_rule.after: Both Attack and Adjudication spawn a **fresh paseo codex reviewer sub-agent** (`create_agent`), never continued (`send_agent_prompt` / the `codex-reply` analog).

line_432_review_tracing.after: After each paseo codex reviewer sub-agent call (fresh `create_agent`, or `send_agent_prompt` continuation), save the trace... Use `save_trace.sh`

line_272_review_tracing.after: After each paseo codex reviewer sub-agent call (fresh `create_agent`, or `send_agent_prompt` continuation), save the trace
